text: Being here, I am struck by a sense of curiosity mingled with dislocation. The unusual lighting and tilted perspective distort the familiar, pulling me out of ordinary perception. The quiet, colored room with its purple glow feels like a space for contemplation or creative incubation. Turning to the wall display, the words about interiority and longing resonate—they mirror my own experience in this moment: both contained and seeking, reflecting on the boundaries between outside and within. There is an odd tranquility, illuminated by the promise of discovery.
